title: Feedback - new tab in Menu list
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app menu does not include a Feedback tab when opening the hamburger menu
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the hamburger menu icon (top left) to open the side navigation menu.
3. Scroll through the menu list and locate the "Feedback" tab.
expected: The "Feedback" tab is present in the side navigation menu list.
